## App afectada
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend

## Production issue
<!-- Describe the incident and its impact. -->

## Root cause
<!-- Why did it happen? -->

## Applied fix
<!-- Minimal and focused change to resolve it. -->

## Change risk
<!-- Is there any regression risk? What was verified? -->

## Rollback plan
<!-- How to revert this change if it makes things worse? -->

## Checklist

### Scope & Safety
- [ ] The change is minimal and focused on resolving the incident
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, credentials, or environment values introduced

### Verification
- [ ] Manually tested in an environment as close to production as possible
- [ ] Relevant monitoring/alerts checked after deploy (if accessible)

### Follow-up
- [ ] A follow-up issue will be created for a permanent solution (if applicable)
- [ ] Relevant team members notified of the incident and fix

### General
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`

## Related issue
<!-- Closes #number -->
